ValidationRule.description: Block moving an order to Cancelled once it has shipped or beyond. Cancellations are only valid pre-shipment; after delivery use a return.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Fulfillment_Status__c), ISPICKVAL(Fulfillment_Status__c, "Cancelled"), OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Fulfillment_Status__c), "Shipped"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Fulfillment_Status__c), "In Transit"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Fulfillment_Status__c), "Out for Delivery"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Fulfillment_Status__c), "Delivered") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This order has already shipped and can no longer be cancelled. Start a return instead once it is delivered.
